Two Am-243 standardized solutions equivalent to about

The filters were dried by an infrared ramp.

To set 0.133 eV as cut-off energy, Gd foils with

was deduced with a gamma-ray spectroscopy.
For Am-243(n,g)Am-244m+g reactions, the reaction rate
was deduced with an alpha-ray spectroscopy.
for Am-243(n,g)Am-244g reactions), decay gamma rays

Gd filtered target for 5 minutes with Pn-2 in KUR.
After several hours of cooling, gamma-ray measurements
were performed on the Am-243 samples and the monitors.
